query:
ALTER TABLE consultantProposals 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS aiFinancialSummary TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS aiWarnings TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS preprocessingStats TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS filteredText TEXT;
